confidence_rationale: This video is a product/equipment demonstration and instructional material for a silicone laparoscopic suture pad. It is NOT a performance video of an FLS trainee completing a task. The video contains: (1) Product overview showing the suture pad, (2) Material demonstration highlighting silicone properties, (3) Live demonstration on an anatomical model showing proper suturing technique. No trainee performance is being evaluated, therefore no FLS scoring is applicable.
cannot_determine: Task ID - video does not show a trainee performing an official FLS task
Completion time - demonstration is educational, not timed performance
Performance penalties - no trainee performance to assess
FLS score - not a performance evaluation

demonstrated_techniques: Sequential suture placement along marked pathway
Use of laparoscopic needle drivers for suturing
verbal_cues: Product labeled as 'Silicone Laparoscopic Suture Pad'
Material highlighted as 'Soft / Durable Silicone Material'
common_errors_addressed: Demonstrates perpendicular needle entry to avoid tissue damage
Shows proper spacing between suture passes
Illustrates clean, controlled needle movement through tissue

summary: This is an instructional/promotional video demonstrating a silicone laparoscopic suture practice pad and proper suturing technique. No FLS task performance evaluation is possible. The video serves as educational material showing correct technique on an anatomical model.
